title: India’s $2 Billion State Stake Sales Buck Equity Market Slowdown
title_cn: 印度 20 亿美元的国家股权出售抵消了股市放缓的影响
summary: India’s federal government raised $2 billion through stake sales in listed state-run companies last quarter, providing a rare bright spot for the country’s subdued capital market after the conflict in the Middle East slowed broader equity issuance.

title: Thailand Gets Serious About Chasing High-Spending Tourists
title_cn: 泰国认真对待高消费游客
summary: Thailand is done chasing tourist records. After decades of measuring success by ever-rising arrival numbers, the government is making its clearest push yet to prioritize how much visitors spend versus how many show up.

title: Singapore Home Prices Rise for Seventh Quarter; Pace Slows
title_cn: 新加坡房价第七季度上涨；步伐放慢
summary: Singapore private home prices rose for a seventh straight quarter as strong demand for new units cushioned the market from the effects of the Iran war.

title: Global M&A Tops $2.5 Trillion After First-Half Deals Surge
title_cn: 上半年交易激增，全球并购金额突破 2.5 万亿美元
summary: The year was tipped to be a potential blockbuster in deals and the first half delivered, setting a pace that is likely to continue in the closing months of 2026.

title: Trump May Ask Supreme Court to Reconsider Carroll Appeal Denial
title_cn: 特朗普可能要求最高法院重新考虑卡罗尔上诉被驳回
summary: President Donald Trump may ask the US Supreme Court to reconsider its decision to turn away his appeal of a $5 million verdict against him in E. Jean Carroll’s sexual-abuse lawsuit, her lawyer said in a court filing asking for an immediate payout of the damages award.

title: Goldman Flags Up Oil Surplus Even as Nations Rebuild Stockpiles
title_cn: 尽管各国重建库存，高盛仍警告石油供应过剩
summary: The global oil market is set to swing back into oversupply as the impact of the Iran war fades and traffic through the Strait of Hormuz recovers, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.

title: Primark’s Sales Fall Before Fashion Chain’s Split from AB Foods
title_cn: 在时尚连锁店从 AB Foods 分拆之前，Primark 的销售额下降
summary: Associated British Foods Plc reported falling sales at its Primark budget fashion chain, as the conglomerate prepares to separate its clothing and food divisions.

title: Jardine Matheson Taps Ex-Indonesian Fund CIO as Country Head
title_cn: 怡和洋行任命前印度尼西亚基金首席信息官为国家主管
summary: Jardine Matheson Holdings has hired Christopher Ganis, formerly chief investment officer at sovereign wealth fund Indonesia Investment Authority, as Indonesia country head, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Gold Drops for Third Day as Jitters Over US Rate Outlook Worsen
title_cn: 由于对美国利率前景的担忧加剧，金价连续第三天下跌
summary: Gold fell for a third day as signals the Federal Reserve may move to tighten policy aided the dollar and traders tracked US-Iran talks.

title: Europe’s Bank Bulls See More Upside After 21% Quarterly Gain
title_cn: 欧洲银行多头在季度收益 21% 后看到更多上涨空间
summary: Following a stellar second-quarter rally for European banks, investors expect one of the region’s hottest equity trades to keep delivering.

title: Abu Dhabi’s MGX Raises $49 Billion for One of the Biggest Ever AI Funds
title_cn: 阿布扎比的 MGX 为有史以来最大的人工智能基金之一筹集了 490 亿美元
summary: MGX has raised $49 billion for one of the biggest ever funds dedicated to artificial intelligence deals, propelling the two-year-old Abu Dhabi firm into the ranks of the most consequential investors in the sector globally.

title: Dollar Gains Ahead of Warsh Speech, Gold Declines: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 沃什讲话前美元上涨，黄金下跌：市场总结
summary: The dollar strengthened against all its Group-of-10 peers as traders awaited key speeches from a swath of central bankers, including Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh, just as bets increased for an interest-rate hike.

title: Japan’s FX Chief Says Past Yen Intervention Has Shown Impact
title_cn: 日本外汇主管称过去的日元干预已显示出影响
summary: Japan’s currency chief said intervention to prop up the yen two months ago was successful and some US authorities voiced support, suggesting he views the move as an effective strategy as the yen hovers at a four-decade low.

title: FTSE 100 Set to Fall to Kick Off Second Half
title_cn: 富时 100 指数下半年将下跌

title: Abu Dhabi Proposes New Offshore-Oil Pricing
title_cn: 阿布扎比提出新的海上石油定价
summary: Abu Dhabi National Oil Co., the UAE’s biggest oil company, is proposing a new pricing methodology for the sale of crude supplies to term customers, opting for an approach that’s more aligned with wider regional trading norms, according to people with direct knowledge of the matter. Bloomberg's Anthony di Paola reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Homegrown AlphaGrep Takes on Jio BlackRock With India Algo Funds
title_cn: 本土 AlphaGrep 携手印度 Algo 基金挑战 Jio BlackRock
summary: High-speed trader AlphaGrep Securities Pvt.’s asset management unit will offer algorithmic-driven trading strategies to India’s retail investors, according to a top executive, pitting it against the likes of Jio BlackRock Asset Management Pvt. for a slice of the nearly $900 billion mutual fund industry.

title: Cheveley: Gold to Recover Over the Next Few Months
title_cn: 切夫利：黄金将在未来几个月内复苏
summary: The price of gold slipped for a third day as traders tracked US-Iran peace talks and weighed signals the Federal Reserve may move to tighten policy. But George Cheveley, Natural Resources Portfolio Manager at Ninety One told Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East & Africa the yellow metal will bounce back soon. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa Plans to Tap Existing Rand Sukuk Bonds This Year
title_cn: 南非计划今年利用现有的兰特伊斯兰债券
summary: South Africa will tap existing rand-denominated sukuk bonds as part of its funding plans for the current fiscal year.

title: Traders on Lookout for Next Yen 'Red Line' | The Asia Trade 7/1/2026
title_cn: 交易员关注下一个日元“红线”亚洲贸易 7/1/2026
summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Steadies as Peace Talks Continue, Hormuz Traffic Recovers
title_cn: 和平谈判继续，石油稳定，霍尔木兹交通恢复
summary: Oil steadied after the biggest quarterly drop since the pandemic, as traders monitored peace talks between the US and Iran and the return of shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: India’s Below-Normal July Rain Forecast Risks Crop Outlook
title_cn: 印度 7 月降雨预报低于正常水平，给作物前景带来风险
summary: India is likely to receive below-normal rainfall in July, the monsoon’s wettest month, after its driest June in 12 years, threatening to further delay crop planting across large parts of the country.

title: RBI’s Short Dollar Book Hit Record in May Before Policy Measures
title_cn: 印度储备银行的美元空头账目在政策措施出台前五月创下新高
summary: The Reserve Bank of India’s short dollar book rose to a record $106.7 billion in May as the central bank used derivatives to defend the currency.

title: In Hindsight, Will a Coming Crash Seem Obvious?
title_cn: 事后看来，即将到来的崩盘是否显而易见？
summary: The template for 2008 holds up after a midyear check on our imaginary hedge fund.

title: Perpetual Shares Surge as Company Reveals Potential Takeover Bid
title_cn: 公司透露潜在收购要约，永续股股价飙升
summary: Perpetual Ltd shares jumped before the company requested a pause in trading citing an approach over a potential takeover deal.

title: Aluminum Falls to Lowest Since February as Dollar Strengthens
title_cn: 随着美元走强，铝价跌至二月份以来的最低水平
summary: Aluminum fell to the lowest since mid-February as a strengthening US dollar continued to pressure commodities.

title: Chinese Inverter Maker Sungrow Plunges 20% on Potential US Ban
title_cn: 中国逆变器制造商阳光电源股价因美国潜在禁令暴跌 20%
summary: Chinese inverter manufacturer Sungrow Power Supply Co. tumbled on Wednesday following a report that the US regulator is drafting a ban on imports due to national security concerns.

title: Foreign Buying of Indian Bonds Hits Record After Tax Break
title_cn: 减税后外资购买印度债券创历史新高
summary: India’s bonds open to unrestricted global investment attracted a record monthly inflow after the government scrapped taxes on foreign investors.

title: Won Slides Toward Weakest Since 2009 as Global Funds Sell Stocks
title_cn: 全球基金抛售股票，韩元跌至 2009 年以来最弱水平
summary: South Korea’s won slid toward its weakest level since the global financial crisis, leading a retreat in Asian currencies, as the dollar strengthened and overseas investors sold local equities.

title: US Lifts Export Restrictions on Anthropic’s Fable 5
title_cn: 美国取消对《Anthropic》《神鬼寓言5》的出口限制
summary: The US government removed foreign access restrictions on Anthropic PBC’s Fable 5 artificial intelligence model, clearing it for wider distribution after the startup resolved the Trump administration’s safety concerns. Bloomberg's Minmin Low breaks down the latest developments. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Reports $1.4 Billion in 2025 Crypto Earnings
title_cn: 特朗普报告 2025 年加密货币收益将达到 14 亿美元
summary: President Donald Trump reported earning at least $1.4 billion in 2025 from crypto and memecoin-related businesses, according to his latest annual financial disclosure. Bloomberg's Kailey Leinz and Romaine Bostick break it down. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alcoa Bets on Aluminum Boom With $5.6 Billion South32 Deal
title_cn: 美铝公司以 56 亿美元的 South32 交易押注铝业繁荣
summary: Alcoa Corp. has agreed to buy South32 Ltd.’s bauxite, alumina and aluminum assets in a deal worth as much as $5.6 billion, cementing its position as a top producer as long-term demand strengthens and the Iran war exposes supply concerns.

title: Mizuho Says Historic Slump in Yen Is Defying the Rates Rulebook
title_cn: 瑞穗表示日元历史性暴跌违反了利率规则
summary: The slump in the yen to historic lows is forcing investors to rethink one of their most widely used strategies to gauge the currency’s moves, according to Mizuho Bank Ltd.

title: Anthropic Says US Lifted Restrictions on Fable 5
title_cn: Anthropic称美国取消了对《神鬼寓言5》的限制
summary: The US government removed foreign access restrictions on Anthropic's Fable 5 artificial intelligence model, clearing it for wider distribution. Anthropic said it had received notice that Commerce was lifting the curbs on access to Mythos 5 and Fable 5 AI models. Some of the restrictions on Mythos had been eased on June 26. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Lifts Export Restrictions on Anthropic’s Fable 5 AI Model
title_cn: 美国取消对 Anthropic 的《神鬼寓言 5》人工智能模型的出口限制
summary: The US government removed foreign access restrictions on Anthropic PBC’s Fable 5 artificial intelligence model, clearing it for wider distribution after the startup resolved the Trump administration’s safety concerns.

title: Kim Dotcom Loses Latest Appeal in Case Against Extradition to US
title_cn: Kim Dotcom 在反对引渡到美国的最新上诉中败诉
summary: Kim Dotcom, the internet entrepreneur facing extradition from New Zealand, has lost the latest round in his legal battle to avoid facing prosecution in the US.

title: OCBC to Raise Annual Tech Spending to More Than $771 Million
title_cn: 华侨银行将把年度科技支出提高到超过 7.71 亿美元
summary: Oversea-Chinese Banking Corp.  plans to increase its annual technology spending, including on artificial intelligence, to more than S$1 billion ($771 million), said a top executive.

title: An English Furniture Maker Faces AI Era of Bots Buying Sofas
title_cn: 英国家具制造商面临机器人购买沙发的人工智能时代
summary: With origins in the English countryside, The Cotswold Company is known for upscale furniture that evokes its bucolic backstory. Now it’s bracing for the era of artificial intelligence.

title: Agilent CEO on Business Strategy, Innovation
title_cn: 安捷伦首席执行官谈商业战略和创新
summary: Padraig McDonnell, President and CEO at Agilent, discusses the company's business strategy and the innovations he sees in the life sciences sector. He speaks with Minmin Low from the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: A Giant Cable Exposes Ireland’s AI Ambitions and Security Risks
title_cn: 一根巨型电缆暴露了爱尔兰的人工智能野心和安全风险
summary: A new Amazon transatlantic fiber-optic link is symbolic of the country’s tech economy, but also of its chronic lack of defense spending.

title: Vertiv Opens Malaysia Plant to Meet AI Data Centers’ Power Needs
title_cn: Vertiv 开设马来西亚工厂以满足人工智能数据中心的电力需求
summary: US data center equipment maker Vertiv Holdings Co. opened a factory in Malaysia, underscoring the rapid pace of AI infrastructure buildout in the Asia Pacific.

title: Japan Investment Corp.'s Hata on AI, Strategic Sectors
title_cn: 日本投资公司的 Hata 谈人工智能和战略领域
summary: Yuka Hata, Senior Managing Director & Head of Fund Investments at Japan Investment Corporation, says demand for capital is growing as Japan shifts its focus toward physical AI and deep technologies. She adds that Japan’s labor shortages have heightened the need for AI-driven solutions, making the sector a key investment priority for JIC. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lee’s $880 Billion AI Bet Ties Legacy to Korea’s Chip Boom
title_cn: Lee 的 8800 亿美元 AI 赌注将遗产与韩国芯片繁荣联系起来
summary: With South Korea already one of the biggest winners of the global AI boom, President Lee Jae Myung is now staking his legacy on a plan to transform the nation’s less developed southwest into a global chip hub.

title: Oaktree Capital-Backed ITG Raises $312.2 Million in US IPO
title_cn: 橡树资本支持的 ITG 在美国 IPO 筹集 3.122 亿美元
summary: Digital infrastructure services firm ITG Inc. raised $312.2 million in a US initial public offering, pricing its shares below a marketed range.

title: Nike Earnings Surpass Expectations as Q2 Comes to a Close | The Close 6/30/2026
title_cn: 第二季度即将结束，耐克盈利超出预期收盘价 2026 年 6 月 30 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are BlackRock Global Co-Head of iShares Fixed Income ETFs Steve Laipply, BNY Head of Market Structure Nate Wuerffel, RBC Capital Markets Managing Director, Software Equity Research Rishi Jaluria, Former US Ambassador to Israel & Former US Treasury Secretary Jack Lew, Pivotal Advisors CEO & CIO Tiffany McGhee, CFRA Equity Analyst Zachary Warring, M Science Research Analyst Drake MacFarlane, WSL Strategic Retail CEO & Chief Shopper Wendy Liebmann, Christian & Timbers Founder & CEO Jeff Christian, & NBA Hall of Famer Yao Ming. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nike Succession in Focus With New CFO Ready To Take Helm
title_cn: 耐克新任首席财务官准备掌舵，继任成为焦点
summary: Jeff Christian, Founder and CEO of Executive Search firm Christian & Timbers, discusses Nike's strategic shift following the completion of its CEO transition. He highlights that the company is now in 'proof mode,' emphasizing execution and delivering improved financial results. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Crypto 6/30/2026
title_cn: 彭博加密货币 6/30/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: Kalshi Head of Enforcement Robert DeNault, BitGet CEO Gracy Chen, Luxor Technology COO Ethan Vera, and Fireblocks Policy Director Dea Markova. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Debt and Risky Bets Fuel South Korea and Taiwan's AI Stock Boom
title_cn: 债务和高风险押注推动韩国和台湾的人工智能股票繁荣
summary: An AI boom has spurred historic rallies in Taiwan and South Korea’s stock markets. But with gains fueled by borrowed money and risky bets, what comes next? Find out on the Big Take Asia podcast. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Debt and Risky Bets Fuel South Korea and Taiwan's AI Stock Boom
title_cn: 债务和高风险押注推动韩国和台湾的人工智能股票繁荣
summary: On today’s Big Take Asia podcast, how an AI-driven stock boom in Taiwan and South Korea is enticing investors to take big risks on one of the world’s hottest market rallies.

title: Don't See Slowdown in Institutional Client Interest: Markova
title_cn: 马尔科瓦：机构客户兴趣并未放缓
summary: Dea Markova, policy director at Fireblocks, joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss the expected updated draft to the Clarity Act that may be released soon. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Crypto Bill Draft Expected Soon
title_cn: 新的加密货币法案草案预计即将推出
summary: Bloomberg Intelligences Nathan Dean joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." One of the Republican senators spearheading efforts to pass an industry-backed measure to regulate cryptocurrency and digital assets said Thursday lawmakers plan to soon release an “updated draft” of the bill that seeks to address members’ concerns over ethics. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court to Hear Apple Appeal Over Contempt Ruling
title_cn: 最高法院将听取苹果公司对藐视法庭裁决的上诉
summary: The Supreme Court agreed to hear an appeal by Apple Inc. regarding a contempt ruling in its long-running antitrust battle with Fortnite-maker Epic Games Inc.

title: Bitcoin Miners Valuable Asset for Electric Grid: Vera
title_cn: 比特币矿工对电网的宝贵资产：维拉
summary: Ethan Vera, COO of Luxor Technology, joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Many miners are shifting their focus to AI. More broadly, crypto firms are beginning to apply the infrastructure and market expertise they built around digital assets to AI, from converting mining sites into data centers to building markets for GPUs and computing power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitget CEO Discusses Tokenization, Market-Making
title_cn: Bitget首席执行官讨论代币化和做市
summary: Gracy Chen, CEO of Bitget, joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Securitize Set to Go Public Thursday
title_cn: 证券化将于周四上市
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's Dushyant Shahrawat joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Securitize debuts on the New York Stock Exchange this Thursday after investors approved its SPAC merger, which will make it one of the first publicly traded pure-play tokenization companies. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Cuts Starlink Internet Prices in Memphis After Data Center Opposition
title_cn: 因数据中心反对，SpaceX 降低孟菲斯星链互联网价格
summary: SpaceX is offering discounts for Starlink internet plans in Memphis, Tennessee, as the Elon Musk-led company endures blowback and legal challenges from opponents of its data centers in the area and neighboring Mississippi.

title: Anthropic Releases Claude Science for Automating Research
title_cn: Anthropic 发布 Claude Science 用于自动化研究
summary: Anthropic PBC is releasing new software aimed at helping scientists automate research, in the hopes of reducing some of the tedious aspects of their work.

title: Comcast’s NBC Spinoff Sets Stage for More Media, Cable Deals
title_cn: 康卡斯特分拆 NBC 为更多媒体和有线电视交易奠定了基础
summary: Brian Roberts lost out on an opportunity last year to merge NBCUniversal with Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. But the process helped get the chairman and co-chief executive officer of Comcast Corp. thinking about what NBCUniversal would look like on its own.

title: High Interest in Perpetual Futures: Kalshi's DeNault
title_cn: 对永续合约的高度兴趣：Kalshi 的 DeNault
summary: Robert DeNault, head of enforcement at Kalshi, joins Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Last month the CFTC permitted the listing of perpetual futures on US exchanges. Kalshi’s contracts were the first perpetual futures approved by the CFTC, marking an expansion beyond the company’s core business of listing event contracts. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ramaphosa Revamps Cabinet at Request of Coalition Partner
title_cn: 拉马福萨应联盟伙伴的要求修改内阁
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa reshuffled his cabinet after the Democratic Alliance, the second-biggest party in the governing coalition, requested personnel changes to ministries it had been assigned.

title: US Says Witkoff, Kushner Had Positive Iran Deal Talks
title_cn: 美国称威特科夫和库什纳就伊朗问题进行了积极的谈判
summary: US negotiators Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff had positive discussions with regional leaders in Qatar and technical talks with Iran are moving ahead, according to a senior administration official. Witkoff and Kushner were in Doha as part of ongoing indirect talks between the Washington and Tehran intended to forge a longer-term peace deal. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Takaichi Heads to India to Bolster Ties as China Tensions Deepen
title_cn: 随着中国紧张局势加剧，高市前往印度加强关系
summary: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi is heading to India for a three-day trip starting Wednesday to bolster economic ties and align on security cooperation with counterpart Narendra Modi as the two Asian powers seek to wean off dependence on China.

title: Xi Positions China’s Ruling Party as Global Force for Progress
title_cn: 习近平将中国执政党定位为全球进步力量
summary: Chinese leader Xi Jinping made a case for his ruling party as a force for global progress and prosperity – a role that would be backed by a strong military – signaling his ambition for the nation to stand at the fore of global affairs.

title: Modi Raises Hormuz Navigation in Call With Iran’s President
title_cn: 莫迪与伊朗总统通话时提出霍尔木兹海峡航行问题
summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi spoke by phone with Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian, emphasizing the importance of freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz as Indian vessels gradually resume voyages to the Persian Gulf.

title: Ukraine’s Missiles Now Have Almost Half of Russia Within Reach
title_cn: 乌克兰的导弹现在几乎可以覆盖俄罗斯的一半领土
summary: Ukraine has expanded the range and intensity of its missile strikes inside Russia, triggering alerts across nearly half of the regions in the world’s largest country so far this year.

title: Trump Reports Receiving About $120,000 in Sports Events Tickets
title_cn: 特朗普报告收到约 12 万美元的体育赛事门票
summary: President Donald Trump received about $120,000 in tickets to high-profile sporting events, including the World Cup Finals, the Daytona 500 and the US Open, according to his latest annual financial disclosure.

title: CSIS' Govella on Japan PM's Visit to India
title_cn: CSIS 戈维拉谈日本首相访问印度
summary: Kristi Govella, Senior Adviser and Japan Chair at the Center for Strategic and International Studies, discusses Japanese Prime Minister Takaichi's upcoming trip to India and the outlook for relations between the two countries. She speaks with Shery Ahn on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Democratic Socialist Ousts House Lawmaker DeGette, DDHQ Projects
title_cn: 民主社会主义者驱逐众议院议员 DeGette，DDHQ Projects
summary: Democratic Socialist Melat Kiros ousted 15-term incumbent Representative Diana DeGette in Colorado’s first congressional district, Decision Desk HQ projected, the latest evidence of a growing divide over the direction of the Democratic Party.

title: Gojek Founder Makarim Found Guilty in Indonesia Laptops Case
title_cn: Gojek 创始人 Makarim 在印度尼西亚笔记本电脑案中被判有罪
summary: Former Indonesian Education Minister and Gojek co-founder Nadiem Makarim was found guilty of corruption over a pandemic-era procurement of Chromebooks for schools, a ruling likely to add to investor concerns about how Southeast Asia’s largest economy distinguishes graft from disputed policy and business decisions.

title: India Temple Donation Probe Casts Shadow Over Modi’s Key Project
title_cn: 印度寺庙捐赠调查给莫迪的关键项目蒙上阴影
summary: An investigation into alleged financial irregularities at a Hindu temple closely associated with Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi is threatening to tarnish one of his party’s signature projects.

title: Trump Reports Earning $26 Million From Foreign Real Estate Deals
title_cn: 特朗普报告从外国房地产交易中赚取了 2600 万美元
summary: President Donald Trump said he had earned at least $26 million in income from an array of new real estate ventures abroad, illustrating how his fortune has grown as his family embraces foreign deal-making in his second term.

title: Trump Takes a Backseat to Reagan Conservatives at Supreme Court
title_cn: 特朗普在最高法院让位给里根保守派
summary: President Donald Trump may have built the Supreme Court’s supermajority, but it was the Reagan Revolution that prevailed during the just-completed term.

title: US Says Witkoff, Kushner Had Positive Talks in Doha on Iran Deal
title_cn: 美国称维特科夫和库什纳在多哈就伊朗协议进行了积极会谈
summary: US negotiators Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff had positive discussions with regional leaders in Qatar and technical talks with Iran are moving ahead, according to a senior administration official, as the countries seek to ease tensions in the wake of recent attacks that imperiled an already fragile ceasefire.

title: Trump & Vance Release Financial Disclosure Reports | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/30/2026
title_cn: 特朗普和万斯发布财务披露报告|权力平衡：最新版 06/30/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Representative Nick LaLota, a New York Republican and member of the House Appropriations and Homeland Security committees, says he was “a little disappointed” by the Supreme Court’s birthright citizenship ruling but believes the opinion leaves room for Congress to act. Rebecca Shi, CEO of the American Business Immigration Coalition, warns Supreme Court decisions affecting Temporary Protected Status could pull hundreds of thousands of workers from the labor force and worsen shortages in health care and long-term care. Representative Greg Stanton, an Arizona Democrat and member of the House Foreign Affairs, Transportation and China Select committees, says Speaker Mike Johnson should work with Democrats on a bipartisan National Defense Authorization Act rather than rely on Republican holdouts. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Reports at Least $1.4 Billion in 2025 Crypto Earnings
title_cn: 特朗普报告 2025 年加密货币收益至少为 14 亿美元
summary: President Donald Trump reported earning at least $1.4 billion in 2025 from crypto and memecoin-related businesses, according to his latest annual financial disclosure.

title: Rep. Stanton Urges Bipartisan Path on Defense Bill
title_cn: 众议员斯坦顿敦促两党共同制定国防法案
summary: Representative Greg Stanton, an Arizona Democrat and member of the House Foreign Affairs, Transportation and China Select committees, says Speaker Mike Johnson should work with Democrats on a bipartisan National Defense Authorization Act rather than rely on Republican holdouts. Rep. Stanton criticizes provisions dealing with abortion and transgender military service, saying they were added to be “purposely divisive.” He also discusses the risk of a September government shutdown, birthright citizenship, China competition and President Donald Trump’s financial disclosures. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Expert: TPS Rulings Risk Deepening Labor Shortages
title_cn: 专家：TPS 裁决有加剧劳动力短缺的风险
summary: Rebecca Shi, CEO of the American Business Immigration Coalition, warns Supreme Court decisions affecting Temporary Protected Status could pull hundreds of thousands of workers from the labor force and worsen shortages in health care and long-term care. Shi celebrates the court’s birthright citizenship ruling, saying it gives employers certainty. She speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. LaLota Sees Path to Limiting Birthright Citizenship
title_cn: 众议员拉洛塔看到了限制出生公民权的途径
summary: Representative Nick LaLota, a New York Republican and member of the House Appropriations and Homeland Security committees, says he was “a little disappointed” by the Supreme Court’s birthright citizenship ruling but believes the opinion leaves room for Congress to act. LaLota says he sees a path for lawmakers to pursue legislation “to narrow the scope” and limit birthright citizenship to those lawfully present in the US and not on tourist visas. He also discusses the court’s campaign-finance ruling, the outlook for Iran talks, gas prices and President Donald Trump’s financial disclosures. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Fight for Voter ID Law Stalls Defense Bill in US House
title_cn: 特朗普争取选民身份法在美国众议院搁置国防法案
summary: President Donald Trump’s demand for new voter identification requirements on Tuesday sidelined a planned congressional vote on a $1.15 trillion annual defense policy bill his administration is seeking.

title: Trump’s DOT Moves to Roll Back Obama-Era Airfare Marketing Rule
title_cn: 特朗普的交通部采取行动取消奥巴马时代的机票营销规则
summary: The US Transportation Department is proposing to roll back a requirement that airlines display total ticket prices more prominently than individual components, such as taxes and fees, in their advertising.

title: Trump Announces Dallas Will Host September Midterm Convention
title_cn: 特朗普宣布达拉斯将举办九月中期大会
summary: President Donald Trump announced Republicans would host a midterm convention in Dallas on Sept. 9-10, an event first floated last year as a way of rallying party voters ahead of what’s expected to be a hard-fought battle for control of Congress in the November elections.

title: Orban Steered More Contracts to Allies Before Loss, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称欧尔班在损失之前向盟友提供了更多合同
summary: The government of former Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban was directing an ever greater share of spending toward politically-connected companies in the two years leading up to a landslide election defeat, a report from an anti-graft body showed.

title: Supreme Court Backs Birthright Citizenship in Blow to Trump
title_cn: 最高法院支持出生公民权，对特朗普构成打击
summary: The US Supreme Court rejected a central plank of President Donald Trump’s immigration agenda on Tuesday, deeming his plan to restrict birthright citizenship to be unconstitutional.

title: UK Defense Plan Blows £5 Billion Hole in Burnham’s Budget
title_cn: 英国国防计划导致伯纳姆预算缺口 50 亿英镑
summary: The UK’s long-awaited Defense Investment Plan leaves several hard choices for Andy Burnham to make if he becomes prime minister, including how to close an almost £5 billion ($6.6 billion) hole in his first budget.

title: Trump Wins Big, Loses Big in Supreme Court Rulings
title_cn: 特朗普在最高法院的裁决中大赢大输
summary: The president’s immigration agenda suffers a setback, but Republican midterm candidates get a boost.

title: Witkoff, Kushner to Hold Indirect Talks With Iran
title_cn: 威特科夫、库什纳将与伊朗举行间接会谈
summary: Qatar said Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff had arrived in Doha as part of ongoing peace negotiations between the US and Iran. Qatari officials say they won't meet directly with the Iranians. Jeff Mason reports from the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former Treasury Secretary Lew on Iran Talks, US-Israel Relations
title_cn: 前财政部长卢谈伊朗会谈、美以关系
summary: Jack Lew, former US Treasury Secretary and former US ambassador to Israel, says economic sanctions on Iran can be effective but need to be used with care. Speaking on "Bloomberg The Close," Lew also comments on the US dollar and the Israel-Lebanon pact. (Source: Bloomberg)
